study_context: DDI study: R-warfarin alone vs R-warfarin + vibegron. Control arm extracted.
dose_note: Assumed standard 25 mg warfarin DDI study dose; not explicitly visible in figure
confidence_notes: Mean curve with error bars clearly visible. Moderate resolution. Y-axis gridlines at 160 intervals allow reasonable interpolation. Warfarin dose assumed not confirmed from figure.

skip_reason: Nusinersen is an antisense oligonucleotide (not a small molecule), excluded per project scope. Additionally, this is a spaghetti plot of individual subjects (not a mean curve), with low image resolution making reliable digitization infeasible.
figure_description: Two-panel individual subject PK spaghetti plot. Plasma Concentration (ng/mL) vs Time After First Dose (h). LP Injection vs Sham Procedure. Panels split by CSF concentration threshold (<=100 vs >100 nmol/L).

skip_reason: Table (AUC, Cmax, Tmax for males/females at different doses), not a C-t plot.
Table (AUC, Cmax, Tmax combined sexes at different doses), not a C-t plot.
Table of metabolite structures (KP415 prodrug, d-MPH, RA, 6-oxo-RA with M/z and matrix info), not a C-t plot.
Table of subject enrollment/completion numbers, not a C-t plot.
Table of study design (Nordette/Vibegron dosing schedule), not a C-t plot.
PD plot (VLVOT in mmHg vs Cavg168 in ng/mL). Exposure-response relationship, not a concentration-time plot.
Table of population PK model parameters (transition probabilities, drug effects, covariate effects), not a C-t plot.
Multi-panel PD response plots (score vs Time in weeks over ~48 weeks). Panels: Overall, Mild, Moderate/Severe, etc. PD efficacy data, not PK concentration-time.
Table of PK parameters (Cmax, Tmax, AUC, Cmin, CL/F) for single and multiple doses at 12.5-75 mg, not a C-t plot.
PD plot (Blood glucose change from baseline in mmol/L vs Time in hours). Shows meal effects (Breakfast, Snack, Warm meal labels). Not a PK concentration-time plot.

Semi-log serum concentration plot but X-axis is treatment cycle/day number (0-24), not hours. Shows trough concentrations across multi-week topical treatment course in pg/mL range. Not a standard single-dose C-t profile suitable for PLM modeling. Topical drug with negligible systemic exposure.
figure_description: Semi-Log Scale. Serum R-837 (imiquimod) and S-26704/S-27700 (metabolite) concentrations in pg/mL across 24 treatment cycles/days.

skip_reason: Table of PK sampling schedule (treatment groups, study days, and timepoints), not a C-t plot.
